title: Wireless Earbuds Bluetooth 5.4 Headphones In Ear, Small Design Mini Sleep Headphones for Side Sleepers, 47H Playtime Sleeping Earbuds Clear Calls, IPX7 Waterproof Earphones, Black Ear Buds
features: Ergonomic Design and IPX7 Waterproof ear buds: Designed with soft silicone material and a compact on-ear design, these lightweight sleeping earbuds provide a comfortable and secure fit and are not prone to causing earaches over long periods of wear. Whether you're sleeping, working out, or on the go, the sleep headphones will stay in place and deliver a comfortable listening experience. In addition, they are designed with IPX7 nano-coating technology, making the wireless earbuds sports waterproof and sweatproof.

Premium Stereo Sound and Clear Call: Engineered with a 13mm dual chamber speaker driver unit, these sleep earbuds keep the sound crisp and balanced with deep bass for a surround sound experience you can take anywhere. Our noise cancelling earbuds are equipped with ENC (Enhanced Noise Cancellation) technology, which filters out ambient noise and gives you a clear call experience as if you were talking to someone face to face.

2026 New Bluetooth 5.4 earbuds and One-Step pairing: The wireless earbuds bluetooth are equipped with the latest version of Bluetooth 5.4 technology, which has been technologically upgraded to provide a low-latency listening experience with transmission speeds up to 90% faster than before. Headphones for sleeping support HFP, HSP, A2DP, AVRCP and can switch pairing modes in less than 1 second. The ear buds for sleeping automatically connect to the last paired device when the charger cover is opened.

47 Hours Playing Time: Our bluetooth earphones have a built-in high-capacity battery, which can provide you with up to 5-7 hours of single playtime and up to 47 hours when used with the mini charging case, just enjoy your music time. The LED display accurately shows the remaining battery level in the charging case, and USB-C quick charge port fully charges the earbuds in just 1.5 hours. So you can safely take these soft ear buds wireless earbuds to work, travel, sports and daily office use.

Touch Control and Wide Compatibility: With the sleep earbuds Bluetooth adopting high-tech touch screen technology, you can answer calls, hang up, play/pause music, adjust the volume, switch songs, and activate Siri with just a touch of your sleep headphones wireless Bluetooth. Compared with a physical button, it largely minimizes the pressure on your ears. Meanwhile, they are compatible with most Bluetooth-enabled devices, including iOS, Android smartphones, laptops, tablet PCs, etc.
